title: Magical Spicy Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: A spicy and silky Jamaican dish featuring cocoa powder, perfect for a quick-fix dinner, high in protein and full of flavor. This recipe combines the richness of cocoa with the heat of scotch bonnet peppers.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the scotch bonnet peppers, curry powder, and cocoa powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Deglaze the skillet with chicken broth, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Add the coconut milk to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer, uncovered, until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with roti.
